name: The Human Body
description: From bones to organs — everything inside and outside the human body.

cards.charadesHint: Mime bending your leg and tapping the bony round disc at the front of your knee
Mime cupping your ear as a sound waves hit and your inner drum vibrates
Mime doubling over in sharp right-sided pain and being rushed into surgery
Mime banging your elbow on a table corner and doing the exaggerated funny-but-not-funny shake
Mime drinking glass after glass then pointing to your right side where an exhausted organ lives
Mime sprinting then suddenly crumpling dramatically as your heel gives way
Mime walking in a perfectly straight line then walking as if you have no balance control
Mime tracing your finger along the bony ridge between your shoulder and neck
Mime shivering as your skin prickles all over with tiny raised bumps
Mime injecting insulin and pointing to where an organ behind your stomach quietly does its job
Mime holding up your thumb and tapping the very small flat nail on top of it
Mime sitting up ramrod straight and then slumping — and the difference it makes
Mime peering into someone's eyes at the coloured ring around the dark centre
Mime breathing deeply, your belly expanding, then getting hiccups from a spasming muscle
Mime pressing the sides of your neck feeling for swollen lumps when you're poorly
Mime carefully placing a tiny lens over the very front surface of your eye
Mime sprinting then pulling up sharply grabbing the back of your upper leg in agony
Mime opening your mouth and a doctor peering in at two swollen lumps at the back
Mime pulling up your shirt and pointing to the little indentation in the middle of your tummy
Mime swallowing and watching a bobbing protrusion in your throat move up and down
Mime flexing your upper arm and pointing at the bulging muscle like a bodybuilder
Mime a camera shutter capturing an image and projecting it on the very back inner wall of an eyeball
Mime your jaw throbbing at the very back as a late arrival tooth tries to push through
Mime a sudden shock — heart pounding, senses sharpened, ready to run or fight
Mime pressing your finger to the side of your head where you can feel your pulse
Mime walking straight into a coffee table and grabbing the front of your lower leg
Mime filtering waste from your blood like a tiny tireless machine working in your back
Mime peering at your skin through a magnifying glass at tiny little holes everywhere
Mime having sharp pain under your ribs on the right after a very fatty meal
Mime a vampire approaching your neck zeroing in on the most obvious vein there
Mime a visible swelling appearing at the front of someone's throat growing gradually larger
Mime doing a push-up and pointing to the muscle on the back of your upper arm doing all the work
Mime shining a torch in someone's eye and watching the centre shrink instantly
Mime tapping the flat bone running straight down the centre of your chest
Mime a runner getting a stitch on the left side of their abdomen and pressing into it
Mime a manicurist pushing back the tiny strip of skin at the base of each nail
Mime squeezing and bending the outside of your ear — firm but flexible, no bone
Mime pressing a tiny button at the base of your brain that controls every other gland in your body
Mime taking a punch right in the middle of your abdomen and gasping for air
Mime a doctor pointing at the larger of the two bones in your lower leg on an x-ray
Mime crying and a tiny channel in the corner of your eye draining the tears away
Mime doing a deep squat and feeling the muscles in your backside working hard
Mime pointing to the longest and strongest bone in the body running from hip to knee
Mime sticking it out, rolling it, and using it to lick an ice cream
Mime peeling back a thin invisible layer from your arm and examining the surface cells
Mime your eyes collecting a picture and sending it directly along a cable to the back of your brain
Mime opening wide and pointing to the large flat teeth at the very back grinding food
Mime pressing two fingers to the inside of your other wrist to find your pulse
Mime a tiny powerhouse generating energy inside every single cell in your body
Mime smelling something delicious and feeling your mouth immediately fill with liquid
Mime pointing to the bony protrusion sticking out on either side of your ankle
Mime being ravenously hungry and desperately thirsty — your body demanding you act on both signals
Mime carefully painting all ten nails in precise detail and admiring the result
Mime blinking very slowly and dramatically, lashes sweeping down over your eyes
Mime the tiniest possible pipes carrying blood right to the surface of the skin
Mime clenching your jaw tightly and then opening as wide as possible repeatedly
Mime an army of tiny soldiers in your bloodstream hunting and destroying invaders
Mime stamping your heel hard on the floor then hobbling because it's a bit sore
Mime blood being pumped powerfully away from a beating heart through large pulsing pipes
Mime patting a rounded stomach contentedly after an enormous meal
